curation_notes: Locations derived from the patch diff. The vulnerability exists in every handler that joins user.BasePath with the request path using stdpath.Join without validating for relative path components. The patch introduces a JoinBasePath utility that rejects paths containing '..' and updates all 6 handler files (server/handles/aria2.go, fsmanage.go, fsread.go, fsup.go, server/middlewares/fsup.go, server/webdav/webdav.go) to use it. The pre-assigned class path-traversal (CWE-22) is correct: the advisory explicitly describes bypassing base path restrictions via '../' sequences.
